stemHtml: For a Fly-By-Wire (FBW) aircraft equipped with Flight Envelope Protection (FEP), which of the following statements is correct?

options.a: It cannot avoid or exit high-speed flight.
options.b: It offers high Angle of Attack (AoA) protection regardless of control law.
options.c: It is impossible to stall the aircraft in normal law by pilot input.
options.d: It disables the autopilot when approaching bank angle limits.
